prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2362名、2891名、3014名、3726名、4673名，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1659名，2025年基准位次约4673名；该校在山东省招生计划2021–2023年均为122人，2024年增至125人，2025年增至129人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划142人，较2025年扩招13人（增幅约10.1%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位居全国第3，属于国内顶尖高校层次，对考生具有极强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、师德师风、校园安全等事件；抖音热度总排名第14（高热），综合热度约377万，短视频平台曝光度高；2021–2025年投档异常记录中浙江大学仅2023年出现中关注信号（湖南文科投档线641分属正常范围），未见明显断档或暴跌。综合来看，声誉负面信号有限，高热度反映关注度持续旺盛；浙江大学拥有39个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、化学工程与技术、机械工程、植物保护、生态学、药学、管理科学与工程等12个学科获评A+，学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学为推荐，这些热门专业与浙大优势学科高度吻合；山东省2026年普通高考考生总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增长约5.7%，考生规模持续扩大；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，与山东省地理距离适中，属于华东地区优质高校，对山东考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生计划占比较高的外省计划份额。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划扩招约10.1%、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%以及浙大顶尖层次与高热关注度等因素：扩招幅度大于考生增长幅度；浙大作为全国第3的顶尖高校，报考热度不减，声誉负面信号影响有限。预测2026年最低录取位次约4956名，区间4456–5456名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院图灵班）（计算机科学与技术）
- 人工智能
- 机器人工程（荣誉项目班）
- 工科试验班（智能光电芯片及系统创新班）（光电信息科学与工程）
- 工科试验班（信息）（计算机科学与技术等）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（临床医学）
- 理科试验班类（含商务大数据分析双学士学位项目）
- 工科试验班（车辆工程、机械工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 社会科学试验班（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班）
- 人文科学试验班（汉语言文学、哲学等）
- 社会科学试验班（含数字金融双学士学位项目）
- 新闻传播学类（含智能与国际传播创新班）
- 政治学与行政学
- 法学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（海洋，含智慧海洋卓越班）
- 应用生物科学（农学，含竺可桢学院新农科实验班）
- 园林。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4456–5456名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考目标、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如接近4456名），可重点冲刺一档的竺可桢学院图灵班、人工智能等王牌专业；若位次接近区间上限（5456名），建议以二档的社会科学试验班、人文科学试验班为主，三档的海洋、农学类专业作为稳妥保底。浙江大学学科实力顶尖，各档专业均有A类学科支撑，考生可根据个人兴趣与位次合理搭配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 2362, 2891, 3014, 3726, and 4673, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 1659 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 4673. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong was 122 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 125 in 2024, and to 129 in 2025. In 2026 (enrollment plan document), the plan is 142 students, an increase of 13 students (approximately 10.1%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has stably ranked 3rd nationally in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top-tier universities in China, which strongly attracts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of approximately 3.77 million, indicating high exposure on short video platforms. From 2021 to 2025, among the filing anomaly records, Zhejiang University only had a medium attention signal in 2023 (the Hunan liberal arts filing score of 641 was within the normal range), with no obvious gaps or crashes. Overall, the negative reputation signals are limited, and the high heat reflects sustained strong attention. Zhejiang University has 39 A- or above disciplines, including 12 A+ disciplines: Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Plant Protection, Ecology, Pharmacy, and Management Science and Engineering. Its disciplinary strength is top-notch and highly matches the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are recommended. These popular majors align well with Zhejiang University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from approximately 681,000 in 2025, indicating a continuous expansion of the candidate pool. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, with a moderate geographical distance from Shandong. It is a high-quality university in the East China region, exerting strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong accounts for a relatively high share of its out-of-province plan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 10.1% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 5.7% increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province, and Zhejiang University's top-tier level and high heat attention: the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate. As the 3rd-ranked top university nationally, its application heat remains undiminished, and the impact of negative reputation signals is limited. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 4956, with a range of 4456 to 5456.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (Computer Science and Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Robotics Engineering (Honors Program Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Optoelectronic Chip and System Innovation Class) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Ba De Nian Medical Class) (Clinical Medicine)
- Science Experimental Class (Including Business Big Data Analysis Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Including Digital Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Journalism and Communication (Including Smart and International Communication Innovation Class)
- Political Science and Public Administration
- Law
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Ocean, Including Smart Ocean Excellence Class)
- Applied Biological Science (Agriculture, Including Chu Kochen Honors College New Agricultural Science Experimental Class)
- Landscape Architecture
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 4456–5456, it is recommended to target Tier 2 majors as the main application goal, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., close to 4456), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as the Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class and Artificial Intelligence. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (5456), it is recommended to primarily target Tier 2 majors like the Social Science Experimental Class and Humanities Experimental Class, with Tier 3 majors such as Ocean and Agriculture as a stable safety net. Zhejiang University has top-tier disciplinary strength, with A-class disciplines supporting each tier of majors. Candidates can reasonably match based on personal interests and rankings.
